title: Client-safe summary
text:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Marcus Reid (youth — 17 years)). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. A YJS report extract is on the papers, but the full pre-sentence report, vulnerability assessment, and youth interview audio are still outstanding. Your case is in the youth court and needs age-appropriate disclosure before we fix strategy.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
